adj_consistency_note: Your eating pattern is consistent, so this isn't random.
adj_impact_cal_down: Expected adherence improvement: ~{pct}%. Easier to hit, easier to track progress.
adj_impact_cal_muscle: Surplus tracking becomes more precise, helping you avoid unintentional fat gain.
adj_impact_cal_up: Sets a realistic ceiling. Makes over-eating more visible and trackable.
adj_impact_carbs_down: A {reduction}g reduction cuts ~{kcal} kcal from carb sources.
adj_impact_fat_adjust: Aligning your target makes fat tracking meaningful and prevents ignoring this macro.
adj_impact_on_track: Maintaining current intake and logging habits will help you reach your goal on schedule.
adj_impact_prot_down: Higher perceived achievement. After 2-4 weeks of hitting {suggested}g, you can step up again.
adj_impact_prot_up: Muscle protein synthesis peaks with ~2.0-2.2g/kg body weight. Increasing provides a new growth stimulus.
adj_reason_cal_down: You've averaged {avg} kcal over {days} days — {pct}% of your {target} kcal goal. {note} A realistic target builds sustainable habits.
adj_reason_cal_muscle: You're eating {avg} kcal — a healthy surplus for muscle gain. Aligning your target lets you track surplus vs. goal more accurately.
adj_reason_cal_up: You're averaging {avg} kcal — {pct}% over your {target} kcal target. Your actual intake is your real baseline.
adj_reason_carbs_down_loss: You're averaging {avg}g carbs — {pct}% over your {target}g target. For weight loss, managing carbs closely matters.
adj_reason_carbs_down_maintain: You're averaging {avg}g carbs — {pct}% over your {target}g target. For maintenance, managing carbs closely matters.
adj_reason_fat_adjust: Your fat intake averages {avg}g — only {pct}% of your {target}g target. Healthy fats support hormones, vitamins, and satiety.
adj_reason_on_track: Analyzed {days} days of data — your macro averages are all within healthy ranges of your goals. Keep up the consistency!
adj_reason_prot_down: You're hitting {avg}g protein — {pct}% of your {target}g target. A stepping-stone target of {suggested}g gives you wins while you build the habit.
adj_reason_prot_up: You're consistently hitting {avg}g protein — {pct}% of target. Your muscles have adapted. A progressive increase to {suggested}g can stimulate further gains.

faq_account_a1: Select 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your account email. Use the secure link we send you promptly; if it has expired, request a new one from the same screen.
faq_account_a2: Open the Support page to submit and follow a support ticket, or email support@nutrio.me. You can also use the Contact page for the currently available contact channels.
faq_account_a3: Yes! You can save multiple addresses (home, work, etc.) in your account and select the appropriate one when scheduling each meal delivery.
faq_account_a4: Open the Affiliate Program from your account to find your referral code and the current reward rules. Eligibility and rewards are shown there before you share your code.
faq_account_q1: How do I reset my password?
faq_account_q2: How can I contact customer support?
faq_account_q3: Can I have multiple delivery addresses?
faq_account_q4: How do I refer a friend?
faq_delivery_a1: Available delivery windows depend on the restaurant, delivery date, and your address. The current time slots are shown when you schedule a meal, before you confirm it.
faq_delivery_a2: When tracking is available for an active delivery, you can follow its status from your order or delivery tracking page. Live location appears after a driver is assigned and starts the delivery.
faq_delivery_a3: Coverage depends on the selected delivery address and each restaurant's service area. Add or select your address to see which restaurants and delivery windows are available to you.
faq_delivery_a4: Delivery fees can vary by order, restaurant, delivery option, and current promotions. Any applicable fee or free-delivery threshold is shown before you confirm the order.
faq_delivery_q3: What areas do you deliver to?
faq_getting_started_a1: Create an account with your email, then complete onboarding with your body measurements, activity level, dietary preferences, and goal. Review the calculated nutrition plan before saving it.
faq_getting_started_a2: Nutrio estimates BMR and TDEE from the profile information you provide, then adjusts calories and macros for your selected goal. These are planning estimates, not a medical diagnosis or prescription.
faq_getting_started_a3: Yes. Update your profile or goal from your account, then review and save the newly calculated targets. Smart adjustments, when enabled, are shown as recommendations based on available progress data.
faq_getting_started_q1: How do I create an account?
faq_getting_started_q2: How are my daily calorie and macro targets calculated?
faq_getting_started_q3: Can I update my health goals later?
faq_no_results_desc: Try a shorter search or send our support team a ticket.
faq_verified_note: Current app guidance in one place
faq_meals_a1: Browse our partner restaurants, filter by dietary preferences, and select meals that fit your nutrition goals. Schedule your meals for breakfast, lunch, or dinner on your preferred dates, and we'll handle the rest!
faq_meals_a2: You can filter by the dietary tags available for partner meals and save preferences in your profile. Always review the meal details and allergen information because tags depend on data supplied for each meal.
faq_meals_a3: The Schedule page shows the dates and time slots currently available for each restaurant. Availability can change, so the confirmed options on that screen are the source of truth.
faq_meals_a4: Pending or confirmed meals can be modified or cancelled when the action is available in Orders or Schedule. The standard policy requires changes at least 24 hours before delivery; once preparation has started, cancellation may be blocked and a meal credit may not be returned.
faq_meals_a5: Your meal allowance, renewal timing, and any rollover rules depend on the active subscription plan. The current balance and plan details in your account show exactly what you can schedule.
faq_meals_q2: Can I filter meals by dietary restrictions?
faq_meals_q3: How far in advance can I schedule meals?
faq_meals_q4: What if I need to cancel or modify an order?
faq_meals_q5: How many meals can I order per week?
faq_nutrition_a1: Nutritional information is provided by our partner restaurants and calculated based on standard serving sizes. While we strive for accuracy, actual values may vary slightly. Use the information as a guideline for your nutrition planning.
faq_nutrition_a2: Yes! Our Progress page shows detailed charts of your calorie intake, macronutrient breakdown, and weight changes over time. You can log your daily weight and see trends to stay motivated.
faq_nutrition_a3: Our calorie and macro calculations are based on established nutritional science and formulas. However, this is not medical advice. For specific health concerns or conditions, please consult a registered dietitian or healthcare provider.
faq_nutrition_a4: Allergen details are shown when supplied for a meal, but partner kitchens may handle common allergens and cross-contact is possible. If you have a severe allergy, do not rely on the app alone; confirm directly with the restaurant before ordering.
faq_nutrition_q1: How accurate is the nutritional information?
faq_nutrition_q2: Can I track my progress over time?
faq_nutrition_q3: Is the nutrition advice from a professional?
faq_pricing_a1: Available plans, meal credits, billing periods, and prices are shown live on the Subscription Plans page. Review the included benefits and renewal terms there before choosing a plan.
faq_pricing_a2: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period. We don't offer refunds for partial periods.
faq_pricing_a3: The payment methods currently supported by Sadad are displayed during checkout. Eligible Nutrio wallet credit is also applied or offered where the checkout supports it.
faq_pricing_a4: Any free trial, introductory offer, or promotion will be clearly displayed on the Subscription Plans page. If no offer is shown, the selected plan is charged according to its displayed terms.
faq_pricing_q1: What subscription plans do you offer?
faq_pricing_q2: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq_pricing_q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq_support_team: Our support team is here to help you with any questions or concerns.

privacy_changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy_children_text: Our service is not intended for individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately.
privacy_contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:
privacy_cookies_text: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience, analyze usage patterns, and deliver personalized content. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacy_info_collect_item_1: Personal identification information (name, email address, phone number)
privacy_info_collect_item_3: Health and dietary information (age, weight, height, health goals, dietary preferences)
privacy_info_collect_item_5: Payment information (processed securely through third-party providers)
privacy_info_collect_text: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:
privacy_info_use_item_2: Process and fulfill your meal orders
privacy_info_use_item_3: Personalize meal recommendations based on your health goals
privacy_info_use_item_4: Calculate nutritional targets and track your progress
privacy_info_use_item_5: Send order confirmations and delivery updates
privacy_info_use_item_8: Improve our services and develop new features
privacy_info_use_text: We use the information we collect to:
privacy_intro_text: Welcome to Nutrio Fuel ("we," "our," or "us"). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our meal planning and delivery service.
privacy_retention_text: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. We may retain certain information as required by law or for legitimate business purposes, such as resolving disputes and enforcing our agreements.
privacy_rights_contact: To exercise these rights, please contact us at support@nutriofuel.com.
privacy_rights_item_1: Access the personal information we hold about you
privacy_rights_item_4: Object to or restrict processing of your information
privacy_rights_text: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
privacy_security_subtitle: Manage your privacy and security settings
privacy_security_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information. This includes encryption, secure servers, and regular security assessments. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy_sharing_item_1: Restaurant Partners: To prepare and fulfill your orders
privacy_sharing_item_2: Delivery Services: To deliver your meals
privacy_sharing_item_3: Payment Processors: To process transactions securely
privacy_sharing_item_4: Service Providers: Who assist in operating our platform
privacy_sharing_item_5: Legal Authorities: When required by law or to protect our rights
privacy_sharing_no_sell: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy_sharing_text: We may share your information with:

terms_acceptance_desc: By accessing or using Nutrio Fuel ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use our Service. We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time, and your continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of any modifications.
terms_account_item_1: Be at least 18 years of age
terms_account_item_2: Provide accurate and complete registration information
terms_account_item_3: Maintain the security of your account credentials
terms_account_item_4: Promptly update any changes to your information
terms_account_item_5: Accept responsibility for all activities under your account
terms_account_must: To use our Service, you must:
terms_account_terminate: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
terms_conduct_req1: Use the Service for any unlawful purpose
terms_conduct_req3: Interfere with or disrupt the Service
terms_conduct_req4: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
terms_conduct_req6: Harass or abuse restaurant partners or delivery personnel
terms_conduct_req7: Resell or commercially exploit the Service
terms_contact_desc: For questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
terms_description_desc: Nutrio Fuel is a meal planning and delivery platform that connects users with restaurant partners to provide healthy, nutritionally-balanced meals. Our Service includes meal scheduling, nutritional tracking, subscription management, and delivery coordination.
terms_dispute_desc: Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of the Service shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with applicable arbitration rules. You waive any right to participate in class action lawsuits.
terms_health_61: 6.1 Not Medical Advice: Our nutritional information and recommendations are for informational purposes only and do not constitute medical advice. Consult a healthcare professional before making significant dietary changes.
terms_health_62: 6.2 Allergens: While we strive to accommodate dietary restrictions, we cannot guarantee that meals are free from allergens. If you have severe allergies, please contact us before ordering.
terms_health_63: 6.3 Nutritional Accuracy: Nutritional information is provided by our restaurant partners and may vary. Values are approximate and should be used as guidelines.
terms_indemnification_desc: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Nutrio Fuel, its affiliates, officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses arising from your use of the Service or violation of these Terms.
terms_ip_desc: All content, trademarks, and intellectual property on our platform are owned by Nutrio Fuel or our licensors. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works without our express written consent.
terms_law_desc: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Qatar, without regard to conflict of law principles.
terms_liability_desc: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Nutrio Fuel shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid for the Service in the preceding 12 months.
terms_orders_51: 5.1 Order Placement: Orders must be placed within your subscription's meal allowance. Once an order is confirmed, modifications may be limited.
terms_orders_52: 5.2 Delivery: We strive to deliver meals at the scheduled time. Delivery times are estimates and may vary due to circumstances beyond our control.
terms_orders_53: 5.3 Cancellations: Order cancellations must be made at least 24 hours before the scheduled delivery time. Late cancellations may result in forfeiture of the meal credit.
terms_registration_desc: To use our Service, you must:
terms_registration_note: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
terms_registration_req1: Be at least 18 years of age
terms_registration_req2: Provide accurate and complete registration information
terms_registration_req3: Maintain the security of your account credentials
terms_registration_req4: Promptly update any changes to your information
terms_registration_req5: Accept responsibility for all activities under your account
terms_severability_desc: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
terms_subscriptions_41: 4.1 Subscription Plans: We offer various subscription plans with different meal allowances and pricing. Plan details are available on our website.
terms_subscriptions_42: 4.2 Billing: Subscription fees are billed in advance on a weekly or monthly basis, depending on your selected plan. All fees are non-refundable except as expressly stated.
terms_subscriptions_43: 4.3 Auto-Renewal: Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled before the renewal date. You may cancel at any time through your account settings.
terms_subscriptions_44: 4.4 Price Changes: We reserve the right to modify pricing with reasonable notice. Existing subscribers will be notified of any price changes before their next billing cycle.
terms_warranties_desc: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure.

ai_report_score_reason_low_logging: Only {days} days were logged. More logged days make the report more accurate.

ai_report_priority_water: Pair water with every meal to close the hydration gap.
ai_report_priority_review: Review the report midweek and adjust before the weekend.
ai_report_protein_gap_body: {amount}g left to close. Choose a high-protein Nutrio meal first.
ai_report_protein_gap_closed: Protein target is covered. Keep the same meal rhythm.
ai_report_calorie_pattern_aligned: Average calories are close to target. Good alignment.

ai_report_calorie_pattern_below: {amount} kcal below target. Make sure meals are fully logged.
ai_report_best_day_logged: Best signal: you logged nutrition data this week.
ai_report_best_day_pending: Pending: log meals to identify your best day.
ai_report_consistency_explanation: You logged {days}/{total} days ({percent}%). Aim for 5+ days for a stronger weekly read.
ai_report_meal_idea_protein: Start with a chicken, fish, egg, or Greek-yogurt style meal to close protein.
ai_report_meal_idea_balanced: Pick a balanced bowl with lean protein, carbs, and vegetables.
ai_report_meal_idea_calorie_fit: Choose meals closer to your calorie target instead of adding unplanned snacks.
ai_report_meal_idea_repeat: Repeat the meals that kept calories and protein stable.
ai_report_meal_idea_nutrio: Use Nutrio meal picks to make the next logged day easier.
ai_report_coach_note_good: You have a strong base. The next win is repetition, not perfection.
ai_report_coach_note_building: You are close to a useful rhythm. Focus on one meal anchor and one water habit.
ai_report_coach_note_start: Start simple: log meals, hit one protein anchor, and review again after 3 days.
ai_report_reward_close: You are close to a weekly nutrition reward. Keep logging to unlock more XP.
ai_report_reward_next: Log {days} more days to move closer to weekly XP and badge rewards.
progress_coach_muscle_low_protein: Increase protein to {protein}g daily. You're at {consumed}g this week, and muscle needs fuel.
progress_coach_muscle_good: Solid protein intake. Keep hitting {protein}g daily and progress your training.
progress_coach_weight_loss: Stay in a calorie deficit while keeping protein at {protein}g daily to preserve muscle while losing fat.
progress_coach_balanced: Keep balanced macros: {protein}g protein, {carbs}g carbs, and {fat}g fat daily.
goal_progress_subtitle: See how your current plan is performing before changing targets.
goal_system_role_desc: Nutrio uses this goal to score progress, guide meal recommendations, and build your AI report.
health_report_clear_desc: Your latest health report is available; no abnormal markers changed these targets.
medical_context_disclaimer: This uses uploaded health markers only as conservative nutrition context. It is not medical advice or a diagnosis.
fill_profile_fields_first: Fill in your height, weight, age, gender, activity level, and health goal first.

goal_impact_meals: Meals will be matched to these calories and macros.
goal_impact_progress: Progress will be measured against this target.
goal_impact_report: AI reports will explain results using this goal.
goal_update_applied_desc: Your active goal now drives meals, progress, and AI reporting.
goal_change_history_desc: Recent changes and why the plan changed.
goal_alignment_desc: How closely this week matches your active goal.
goal_alignment_tracking_desc: Log meals this week so Nutrio can score this goal fairly.
goal_review_need_data_desc: Log at least 3 days so Nutrio can judge whether this goal is working.
goal_review_reduce_calories_desc: Your intake is running above the goal. Keep the goal, but choose lighter meals or adjust portions.
goal_review_raise_calories: Fuel is below your gain target
goal_review_raise_calories_desc: Your intake is below the surplus needed for muscle gain. Add a balanced meal or snack.
goal_review_raise_protein_desc: Your calories may be workable, but protein is below target for this goal.
goal_review_keep_plan_desc: Your calories, protein, and consistency are aligned with the active goal.
goal_review_watch_week_desc: The goal is usable, but one signal needs attention before changing targets.
meal_goal_fit_desc: This meal uses {calories}% of daily calories and {protein}% of daily protein.
schedule_goal_fit_desc: Planned meals vs your active nutrition goal.
nutrition_performance_set_goal_summary: Set calorie and protein targets to unlock your readiness score.
nutrition_performance_no_target: No saved nutrition target is available yet.
nutrition_performance_summary_almost: A small adjustment can finish the day well.

nutrition_performance_summary_hydration: Focus the next meal on hydration and lighter foods.
nutrition_performance_summary_calories: Focus the next meal on balanced calories.
nutrition_performance_summary_general: Focus the next meal on protein, hydration, and calories.
nutrition_performance_reason_no_calories: No calories logged yet, so the score is based on missing meal data.
nutrition_performance_reason_protein_gap: {amount}g protein left to hit your target.
nutrition_performance_reason_hydration: Hydration is at {percent}%, below the daily target.
nutrition_performance_reason_body_load: High body load today means your next meal should support recovery.
nutrition_performance_reason_readiness: Readiness is low, so recovery nutrition matters more today.
nutrition_performance_reason_aligned: Calories, protein, hydration, and meal timing are aligned.
health_provider_apple_desc: Native mobile health data for readiness, sleep, steps, and workouts.
health_provider_google_desc: Android activity and fitness signals through Health Connect for daily load and calories.
health_provider_garmin_desc: Planned training-load and recovery sync for Garmin watch users.
health_provider_strava_desc: Planned activity import for runs, rides, and community motivation.
health_provider_trainingpeaks_desc: Planned coach-grade plan compliance and fatigue context.
health_provider_athlytic_desc: Benchmark model for recovery, exertion, and readiness behavior.
connect_activity_apps_desc: Sync steps, workouts, and heart-rate data from your watch or fitness app.
health_sync_available_mobile: Health sync is available on iOS and Android devices.
health_plugin_required: Native plugin required in the mobile build.
sync_health_to_unlock: Connect a health app or log activity to unlock readiness insights.
readiness_ready_desc: Your recovery signals look strong. Keep meals protein-forward and stay hydrated.
readiness_balanced_desc: Your body looks steady. Keep activity moderate and match meals to your goal.
readiness_recover_desc: Your signals suggest a lighter day. Focus on hydration, protein, and sleep.
body_load_balanced_desc: Activity is in a useful range today.
body_load_high_desc: Activity load is high. Recovery nutrition matters today.
body_load_need_sync: Sync or log activity to calculate today's load.
readiness_tip_sync: Sync your watch or log one activity so Nutrio can personalize food guidance.
readiness_tip_recovery_meal: Choose a protein-rich meal with steady carbs to support recovery.
readiness_tip_high_protein: You can handle a stronger day. Keep protein high and calories aligned.
readiness_tip_balanced: Stay balanced: protein first, enough water, and avoid skipping meals.
readiness_data_sources: Uses synced health app data and Nutrio activity logs when available.
readiness_trend_desc: Average readiness from synced and logged activity.
high_load_days_desc: Days where activity load may need recovery support.
recovery_plan_sync: Sync health data to build your baseline.
recovery_plan_restore: Make today a restore day: lighter movement, earlier sleep, and steady protein.
recovery_plan_refuel: Refuel today: protein plus steady carbs after activity.
recovery_plan_build: Good window to build: keep protein high and train if planned.
recovery_plan_maintain: Maintain rhythm: moderate activity and balanced meals.
recovery_alert_low_readiness: Readiness is low today. Keep activity lighter and focus on protein, water, and sleep.
recovery_alert_high_load: Body load is high today. Add recovery nutrition before your next hard session.
smart_goal_adjustment_desc: Let AI adjust targets based on your progress.
smart_goal_notification_message: {{count}} nutrition target suggestion is ready. Start with {{label}}.
outdoor_waiting_gps: Waiting for a precise GPS fix
outdoor_precise_location_desc: Used while this screen is open to calculate your route, distance, and pace.
outdoor_native_tracking_desc: Nutrio keeps recording while the screen is locked and saves recovery checkpoints locally.
outdoor_safe_mode_desc: If the browser cannot reliably track in the background, Nutrio pauses and keeps a local recovery checkpoint.
outdoor_auto_pause_desc: Pause time when you stop moving
outdoor_background_paused: Tracking paused when Nutrio moved to the background. Resume when this screen is visible.
outdoor_estimate_note: Audio cue every kilometer · Calories use a GPS/MET estimate
outdoor_recovery_desc: Nutrio recovered a {activity} checkpoint with {distance} km recorded.
outdoor_import_private: Imported routes are private by default.
